name: deserted Jovian mining colony
description: I'm in a deserted Jovian mining colony
hints: A deserted mining colony with a treasure and a useful item.
The flask of Saurian Brandy is a treasure - take it!
The twisted metal piece might be useful as a tool.
GET FLAS (treasure) and GET META (may be useful for puzzles).
notes: Deserted Jovian mining colony. Contains the Ancient Flask of Saurian Brandy treasure and a metal piece.
